name: new-feature-scaffold
description: New feature scaffolding: types first, then skeleton, then implementation, then tests.
steps: Define the public interface (types, function signatures, exports) before writing logic
Create file stubs with correct imports/exports — verify the project compiles
Implement the core happy path first, skipping edge cases
Add input validation and error handling
Write tests covering happy path, edge cases, and error paths
Wire the feature into the existing system (routes, config, CLI flags)
